title: hyptis mutabilis var. canescens
intro: Hyptis mutabilis var. canescens, also known as 'Canescens Hyptis' or 'False Thyme', is a variety of the Hyptis mutabilis plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hyptis mutabilis var. canescens include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
